title: Cybersecurity: Foundations, Practice, and Professional Responsibility
description: An ABET CAC-aligned intelligent textbook covering cybersecurity as both a computing-based discipline and a sociotechnical practice. Spans the eight CSEC2017 knowledge areas — Data, Software, Component, Connection, System, Human, Organizational, and Societal Security — with adversarial thinking, risk reasoning, and defensible design as cross-cutting themes.
creator: Dan McCreary
